{{nihongo|'''Kasuga- Shrine'''|春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kasuga- Shrine'''|春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kasuga- Shrine'''|春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kasuga- Shrine'''|春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kasuga- Shrine'''|春日神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
